name: Monogram Flag Tee R.O.C.
subtitle: 7.1oz Heavyweight Cotton
description: A heavyweight oversized T-shirt designed for everyday wear.

dropdowns.title: Details
dropdowns.text:
• Oversized fit
• Dropped shoulders
• Heavyweight cotton jersey

dropdowns.title: Size
dropdowns.text: Designed for an oversized fit. We recommend taking your usual size. Please refer to the size guide for detailed measurements.

dropdowns.title: Shipping
dropdowns.text: Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. Shipping times vary depending on your destination. Tracking information will be sent once your order has shipped.

dropdowns.title: Care
dropdowns.text: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low or hang dry. Iron inside out if needed.

dropdowns.title: Log
dropdowns.text: This garment is part of the ongoing Yiichen de Lajii archive. Future production updates and release information will be documented here.
